improvements: Fixed: POST /api/patients missing auth — added bearer token requirement
Fixed: PUT /api/inventory/{id}/adjust missing auth — added bearer token requirement
Fixed: Replaced plain SHA-256 password hashing with PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 (260k iterations, random salt per user)
Fixed: Replaced deprecated @app.on_event('startup') with lifespan context manager
Fixed: Replaced deprecated declarative_base() with DeclarativeBase subclass (SQLAlchemy 2.0)
Fixed: Inventory ID collision risk — replaced count-based ID with uuid hex
Improvement: Added Optional type hints to PatientUpdate and InventoryUpdate Pydantic models
Improvement: Added skip/limit pagination to GET /api/patients and GET /api/inventory
Improvement: SQL-level risk_score filtering in search_patients (was Python-level)
Improvement: Added structured logging throughout the application
Improvement: Created tests/conftest.py and tests/test_main.py (20 tests, all passing)
Improvement: Added .github/workflows/ci.yml (ruff lint + pytest on every push/PR)
Improvement: Added SECRET_KEY and DATABASE_URL to .env.example
Improvement: Updated README with CI badge, Testing section, and corrected auth table
